spawn.motion: each orb spirals inward from 160px radius to final 85px orbit

vfx.geometry: brief triangle rune appears then dissolves

height_variation.method: orb scale and brightness change by depth

trails.pattern: stardust connects briefly into triangle and hexagram fragments

idle_particles.motion: drift outward then curve back into orbit path

extra_vfx.nova: small prismatic nova burst at collision point
extra_vfx.afterimage: orb leaves 2 ghost copies fading over 0.18s

level_scaling.trail_density_growth: adds 2 trail particles per orbit cycle every 2 levels

rendering_notes.trail_priority: behind orb but above player shadow
rendering_notes.impact_priority: above enemies and damage numbers briefly
rendering_notes.performance: pool all particles; cap total active trail particles at 120

visual_identity.energy_behavior: constant crackling with ionized air distortion

charge.description: Tesla energy gathers around the caster in pulsing electromagnetic rings.

release.description: Stored energy compresses and detonates forward into a concentrated lightning bolt.

flight.description: Bolt travels while constantly generating branching electrical tendrils and ionized air trails.

target_tracking.description: Electric lasso tendrils probe nearby targets before snapping toward the chosen victim.

impact.description: A devastating electrical detonation erupts on contact.

multi_bolt_synergy.description: Nearby Capy Bolts interact through electromagnetic interference.

spawn.description: Ice crystal condenses from frozen air and rapidly crystallizes into a complete orb.

travel.description: A rotating crystalline orb glides forward, shedding frost and refracting ambient light.

impact_shatter.description: The orb fractures explosively into razor-sharp icicle shards and blooming crystal formations.

freeze_aura.description: Frozen enemies become encased in cold energy while snowflakes orbit around them.

dissipate.description: Remaining frost crystals melt into sparkling magical particles.

idle_swirl.description: A muddy vortex circles the player while noxious fumes rise and drift outward.

pulse_burst.description: Aura suddenly expands with a toxic glow flash and erupts into poisonous bubbles.

damage_tick.description: A small corruption burst detonates on the enemy when poison damage ticks.

corruption_spread.description: Purple corruption crawls over enemies inside the aura like living poison veins.

deactivate.description: The mud vortex loses momentum, collapses into the ground, and releases the last fumes upward.

charge.description: Sonic pressure condenses at the player, pulling particles inward as unstable rings begin forming.

release.description: Pressure detonates outward into an explosive sonic ring.

expand.description: Three concentric jagged rings rip across the screen, warping space and scattering sonic particles.

impact_zone.description: Enemies are blasted backward with visible sonic impact distortion.

dissipate.description: Main rings collapse into fading ripples while final particles scatter outward.

idle.description: A gentle healing aura breathes around the player while warm particles float upward.

tick_heal.description: A tiny burst of loving light blooms from the player as healing is applied.

low_hp_attract.description: Healing particles become eager and curve inward toward the player like the aura is feeding them warmth.

enemy_proximity.description: The calm aura briefly becomes protective, flaring outward as a soft but firm barrier.

fade_out.description: The healing light relaxes, particles slow down, and warmth drifts away.

center_vortex.consume_effect: particles shrink and flash into center

idle.description: Three teal rings breathe inward and outward while a small vortex quietly spins at the player.

activation_pulse.description: The attraction field snaps open, expanding its pull radius with a bright teal flare.

active_pull.description: XP orbs curve into spiral paths and accelerate toward the glowing center vortex.

high_density.description: The field reacts to many nearby resources, brightening into a stronger gravitational tornado.

fade.description: The vortex releases its pull as rings slow, fade, and remaining particles drift away.

spawn.description: Fireballs ignite from compressed sparks, bloom into meteors, and lock into elliptical orbit paths.

orbit.description: Fireballs carve aggressive elliptical arcs around the player, speeding and slowing for a meteor-like swing.

ember_trail.description: Each fireball sheds curved ember trails that fall slightly before burning out.

smoke_puffs.description: Dark smoke blooms behind the meteors and drifts upward, lingering after the fire passes.

impact_explosion.description: The meteor detonates into a hellfire blast with mushroom cloud, fire rings, and screen-searing flash.

level_scaling.fireball_count: 2 at level 1, 3 at level 2, 4 at level 3+

charge.description: Electrical pressure coils inward toward the player as the screen dims and sparks compress into a white-hot core.

release.description: The stored charge detonates outward in a blinding discharge.

ring_expand.description: Four jagged electrical rings expand with staggered timing, branching outward as they sweep through enemies.

lightning_branch.description: Lightning bolts lance from the player toward enemies caught near the expanding rings.

chain_hit.description: Hit enemies discharge secondary tendrils and a small shockwave, spreading electricity one level deep.

activate.description: Air pressure collapses into the player, then erupts outward into a towering vortex.

initial_ring_setup.spiral_alignment: rings twist into stacked cyclone layers

spin_intense.description: Multiple vortex layers spin at extreme speeds while rings breathe inward and explode outward.

mini_tornado_orbit.description: Smaller satellite tornados orbit the main vortex, carving extra wind trails around the storm.

wind_particles.description: Wind particles spiral upward chaotically instead of traveling straight, creating a living cyclone texture.

enemy_caught.description: Enemies lift off the ground, spin helplessly, then get thrown outward by the storm wall.

dissipate.description: The hurricane loses pressure, the rings unwind, and wind particles scatter into mist.

level_scaling.mini_tornado_count: 3 at low levels, 4 at higher levels

charge.description: The sky dims as the first impossible snowflakes appear and spiral downward toward the battlefield.

release.description: A sudden white-cyan detonation drops the temperature instantly and floods the screen with snow.

peak_storm.description: The world is consumed by a dense ice storm: heavy snow, icicle rain, blue darkness, and enemy freeze shells.

large_icicle_phase.description: Massive icicles spear down from the frozen sky and detonate into shockwaves.

dissipate.description: The blizzard loses force, snow slows, the blue tint fades, and frozen enemies begin to thaw.

draw.description: A radiant arrow forms at the player with tight bow tension and growing golden glow.

release.description: Arrow snaps forward with a clean shockwave burst and crisp bow twang.

flight.description: The arrow cuts forward, perfectly aligned with its path and leaving a golden ribbon of light.

pre_impact.description: Arrow tip shines brighter just before piercing impact.

impact.description: Arrow shatters into radiant light, sending green-gold waves through the pierced line.

release.description: A cluster of arrows bursts outward at once, opening into a clean 60-degree fan.

flight.description: Arrows separate further as the fan opens, creating intersecting ribbons of green light.

curved_paths.description: Each arrow bends slightly for organic ballistic motion instead of perfectly straight lines.

pre_impact.description: Each arrow intensifies before impact, briefly sharpening its trail and glow.

staggered_impact.description: Arrows impact in a rapid stagger, producing multiple small radiant explosions across the fan line.

charge.description: A massive ice arrow crystallizes instantly from cyan energy.

release.description: The arrow fires with a sharp sonic boom and icy pressure burst.

flight.description: The crystal arrow pierces forward in a flawless straight line, dragging prismatic lens flares behind it.

pierce_hit.description: Each enemy is pierced cleanly, leaving a cyan wound-trail and crystal spark burst.

exit_impact.description: The arrow detonates into a massive crystalline shatter at the end of its path.

pierce_through_mechanics.balance_note: Unlimited pierce should be balanced by cooldown, narrow hit width, or reduced base damage.

appear.description: The sky darkens as arrows materialize from top to bottom in ominous formation lines.

arrow_fall.description: Fifty-plus arrows descend in coordinated wave patterns, flooding the screen with readable projectile rhythm.

continuous_rain.description: New layers of arrows enter every 0.3 seconds, forming overlapping arcs that create a light-show curtain.

impact_rain.description: Arrows strike in rhythm across the battlefield, creating dust clouds, small explosions, and lasting ground scars.

dissipate.description: The final arrows clear the screen while dust settles and impact marks slowly fade from the battlefield.

launch.description: Star knife appears with spin start

impact.description: Sharp bounce or burst effect on hit

outbound.description: Arc trajectory away from player with trail

return.description: Arc trajectory back to player, faster than outbound

catch.description: Brief glow effect if caught by player

shockwave.description: Rings emanate from slash intersection points

impact.description: Brief darkness or flash at impacts

charge.description: Energy gathers, glow intensifies, spin-up begins

vortex.description: Main effect at full power with swirling motion

peak.description: Maximum damage zone with brightest intensity
